textByHashes.168a6cc11f944fe2a7c81582a9d7c0485e3756c9: A selection of items for those who partake in variety! That said, be aware that I have little interest in coins...
textByHashes.fccf84ba1ffdad579bec8f358298469214358b53: Hey there! Sorry, I'd love to talk, but I'm very busy right now.
textByHashes.83c6fe7729929a14d9df8f0f0a918506ea5c129f: Hey there. I'm afraid I don't have anything for sale at the moment. Maybe another time?
